State.raw:
int32 id                                    # state ID inside a state machine
int32 parent -1                             # ID of the parent of this state

string name                                 # state name inside the state machine
yasmin_msgs/Transition[] transitions        # transitions for this state
string[] outcomes                           # list of outcomes of this state

bool is_fsm                                 # whether this state is a state machine
int32 current_state -1                      # ID of the current state of this state if it is a state machine

fields.name: id
fields.comment: state ID inside a state machine

fields.name: parent
fields.comment: ID of the parent of this state

fields.name: name
fields.comment: state name inside the state machine

fields.name: outcomes
fields.comment: list of outcomes of this state

fields.name: is_fsm
fields.comment: whether this state is a state machine

fields.name: current_state
fields.comment: ID of the current state of this state if it is a state machine

StateMachine.raw: yasmin_msgs/State[] states      # list of states that compose a state machine

fields.name: states
fields.comment: list of states that compose a state machine

Transition.raw:
string outcome      # outcome, from a state, of the transition
string state        # state (also can be an outcome of a state machine) of the transition

fields.name: outcome
fields.comment: outcome, from a state, of the transition

fields.name: state
fields.comment: state (also can be an outcome of a state machine) of the transition
